data.title: Mission Bank opens new office in North San Luis Obispo County with Loan and Deposit Production team led by Mark Pearce.
data.description: In January 12, 2026, Mission Bank announced their expansion in the Central Coast by introducing a Loan and Deposit Production team in North San Luis Obispo County. Mark Pearce heads the team, assisted by Relationship Managers Sarah Kramer. This move aims to strengthen Mission Bank's presence in the region and boost their lending and deposit services, catering to the growing population in North San Luis Obispo County.

data.title: Atkore Inc. (NYSE: ATKR) to release Q1 FY 2026 results on Feb 3, 2026, and hold conference call at 8:00 a.m. (ET).
data.description: Atkore Inc., a prominent electrical products manufacturer catering to various sectors such as commercial, industrial, data center, telecommunications, and solar applications, disclosed its plan to unveil the financial results for the First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026 on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, prior to the market opening. Following this release, the Company is scheduled to conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. (ET) on the same day to delve into the details of the results. data.title: Earnings season begins with banks reporting. JPMorgan earning estimates: $4.95/share on $46.2 billion revenue.CEO comments key.
data.description: This week marks the beginning of the fourth-quarter earnings season, with major banks set to report their financial results. BAC stock is currently in motion, with a focus on the chart and price action. The Big Six banks are anticipated to demonstrate an upturn in investment banking fees driven by a remarkable 42% year-over-year increase in global M&A activity as reported by Dealogic. The earnings calendar for the upcoming week includes key events: On Tuesday, Jan. 13 Before Market Open, JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) initiates the fourth-quarter earnings season with their report scheduled to be disclosed before the market opens. CEO Jamie Dimon's insights on the resilience of the U.S. consumer and global geopolitical risks affecting the market in the upcoming year will be closely observed by investors. Analysts have forecasted earnings of $4.95 per share on revenue of $46.2 billion from the nation's largest bank.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to ARES 2026-GCP CMBS with $430M collateral loan, based on Term SOFR + 2.15% spread.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has issued preliminary ratings for three classes of ARES 2026-GCP, a CMBS single-borrower securitization. The deal involves a $430.0 million floating rate, interest-only mortgage loan. The loan's initial term is two years, with the potential for three 12-month extensions. Borrowers will make monthly interest-only payments calculated using one-month Term SOFR plus a 2.15% assumed spread. The loan will be secured by the borrowers' assets.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to $401.4M BRAVO 2026-NQM1 RMBS transaction with 779 mortgages, 99.3% FRMs, and 0.7% ARMs.
data.description: KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 10 classes of mortgage-backed notes from BRAVO Residential Funding Trust 2026-NQM1, totaling $401.4 million. The transaction is backed by 779 residential mortgages, with fixed-rate mortgages representing 99.3% of the pool and hybrid adjustable-rate mortgages making up the remaining 0.7%. Nearly half of the loans (48.5%) are exempt from the Ability-to-Repay/Qualified Mortgage rule due to certain criteria.

data.title: Energy Transfer LP priced $3.0 billion of senior notes, including $1.0 billion each of 4.550%, 5.350%, and 6.300% notes.
data.description: In Dallas, Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET) has disclosed the pricing for its recent offering. The company is offering $3.0 billion in total, comprising of $1.0 billion in 4.550% senior notes due 2031, $1.0 billion in 5.350% senior notes due 2036, and $1.0 billion in 6.300% senior notes due 2056. The senior notes are being offered to the public at prices of 99.830%, 99.933%, and 99.842% of their face value, respectively. The settlement for this sale of senior notes is anticipated to occur soon.
